psalm-101-1.verse:
I will sing of lovingkindness and justice,
  To You, O Lord, I will sing praises.
psalm-101-1.prayer: Lord, help me sing of Your lovingkindness and justice. Let my life worship You with both gratitude and righteousness.

psalm-101-2.verse:
I will give heed to the blameless way.
  When will You come to me?
  I will walk within my house in the integrity of my heart.
psalm-101-2.prayer: Father, teach me to walk with integrity in my heart, my home, and every part of my life.

psalm-101-3.prayer: Lord, guard my eyes from worthless things. Help me reject anything that pulls my heart away from You.

psalm-101-4.verse:
A perverse heart shall depart from me;
  I will know no evil.
psalm-101-4.prayer: Father, remove crookedness from my heart. Keep me from evil and make my desires pure before You.

psalm-101-5.verse:
Whoever secretly slanders his neighbor, him I will destroy;
  No one who has a haughty look and an arrogant heart will I endure.
psalm-101-5.prayer: Lord, protect me from pride, slander, and arrogance. Teach me to speak with humility, truth, and love.

psalm-101-6.verse:
My eyes shall be upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me;
  He who walks in a blameless way is the one who will minister to me.
psalm-101-6.prayer: Father, help me value faithfulness and surround my life with what honors You.

psalm-101-7.verse:
He who practices deceit shall not dwell within my house;
  He who speaks falsehood shall not maintain his position before me.
psalm-101-7.prayer: Lord, keep deceit and falsehood far from me. Let honesty and integrity mark my words and actions.

psalm-101-8.verse:
Every morning I will destroy all the wicked of the land,
  So as to cut off from the city of the Lord all those who do iniquity.
psalm-101-8.prayer: Father, help me reject evil quickly and faithfully. Let my life be set apart for what is righteous and pleasing to You.

psalm-101-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for calling me to a life of integrity, justice, and faithful devotion. Guard my eyes, purify my heart, and help me reject anything that dishonors You. Teach me to walk uprightly in my home, my words, and my actions. May my life reflect Your lovingkindness, truth, and righteousness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
